bead.title: guardrail: --no-review break-glass with required ack flag + review:skip-reason rationale
bead.description: Per locked decision: --no-review keeps as break-glass requiring an ack flag (e.g. --no-review-i-know-what-im-doing). review:skip label requires sibling rationale label (review:skip-reason:*) or is ignored.
bead.acceptance: 1. --no-review without ack flag errors with explanation. 2. review:skip label ignored without sibling review:skip-reason. 3. Tests cover both guardrails. 4. CLI help documents the ack flag.
